---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new indicator or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the context. What information is currently missing from the HUD?

**Proposed indicator**
Which line would it appear on? What would it look like?

```
╭─ ... (line 1)
├─ ... (line 2)
╰─ ... 🆕 new-indicator (line 3)
```

**Data source**
Where does the data come from? (Claude Code payload field, local file, CLI command, etc.)

**Graceful degradation**
What should the indicator show when the data source is unavailable?

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links, or examples from other tools.
